video_title: Wheels on the Bus | London, New York, Kenya Safari & More | 33 Min for Kids | ChuChu TV
channel_title: ChuChu TV Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs

segments.text: Choo-choo TV!
The Wipeers on the Bus Go Swish!
The Wipeers on the Bus Go Swish!
All Day long!
The Door's on the Bus They Open and Close!
Open and Close!
Open and Close!
The Door's on the Bus They Open and Close!
The money on the bus goes clink clink clink clink clink clink clink clink
The money on the bus goes clink clink all day long
So wheels on the bus go round and round Round and round and round
So wheels on the bus go round and round all day long
So wheels on the bus go round and round Round and round
So wheels on the bus go round and round all day long
The people on the bus go up and down
Up and down, up and down
The people on the bus go up and down all day long
Hey, the dogs on the bus go south out out out out preferably
All day long
The driver on the bus says move on back
Move on back, the driver on the bus says move on back, all day long
The baby on the bus says, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, wow, all day long
The mommy on the bus says, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, all day long
The wheels on the bus go round and round, round and round and round, round and round, all day long
The wheels on the bus go round and round, round and round, round and round, round and round, round and round

The Big Ben Clock goes tick tick tick tick, tick tick tick tick tick tick tick the big Ben Clock goes tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick tick...
The bus now goes to the London eye, London eye, the London eye, the bus now goes to the
London eye, London eye.
The people can watch the wheels so high, the wheels so high, the wheels so high, the
bus now goes to the tower bridge, tower bridge, tower bridge, the bus now goes to the tower
bridge, tower bridge.
The tower bridge goes open and close, open and close, open and close, the tower bridge
goes open and close, open and close.
The red light says stop the bus, stop the bus, stop the bus.
The red light says stop the bus, stop stop the green light says move forward, move forward,
move forward the green light says move forward go go go.
The London tower is on your right on your right, the London tower is on your right on
your right.
Round and round, Round and round, Round and round
The wheel on the bus, the round and round, Round and round and round
Round applies to the scallops
Round canadien
Round and round nosso
Round is no cut
vowels
bass
Choose a
lyn
Now, now, now, now, now, now!
The tiger in the forest shows roar roar roar roar roar roar roar roar roar roar
The tiger in the forest shows roar roar roar roar roar roar roar roar
The wheel on the businental around, around, around, around, around, around
The wheel on the busentric around, around, around, around

Up in Anshia
Up in Anshia
The door on the bus goes up in Anshia
Up in Anshia
Oh! It's raining!
Let's switch on the wipers
The wipers on the bus go switch switch switch
Switch switch switch
Switch switch switch
The wipers on the bus go switch switch switch switch
The horn on the bus goes beep beep beep
The horn on the bus goes beep beep beep

The baby on the bus goes, well, well, well, well, well, well, well, well, well, well.
